identity.supported_scope: pure voltage-domain event-driven transient behavioral Verilog-A
identity.title: Baseband AGC and Filter Chain

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic voltage-domain behavioral Verilog-A suitable for transient simulation.
Use public voltage contributions only and preserve the declared artifact and module interfaces.
Do not hard-code evaluator stimulus, sample windows, checker tolerances, gold internals, or simulator side channels.

properties.observable_contract: Reset or disabled operation restores gain code 4, clears metrics and flags, and drives vout to vcm.
Each enabled rising clock samples the input magnitude and moves the bounded gain code toward the target deadband.
The VGA applies gain_min plus gain_lsb times code and the sampled filter moves by alpha toward that VGA result.
clip_flag reports an unclamped filter excursion beyond the rails and settled asserts only after three consecutive in-tolerance updates.
